Board 'approved the Conversions in May 2020' — month only → announce_date NA. No MF/ETF tickers in excerpt; effective date not stated.

Same filing: Guinness Atkinson Dividend Builder Fund → SmartETFs Dividend Builder Fund (ETF). Board 'May 2020' month only → NA. No tickers; effective date not stated. Dividend Builder without geography → NA.

Guinness Atkinson Funds 497 filed 2021-02-12 (prospectus dated September 21, 2020): 'SmartETFs Asia Pacific Dividend Builder ETF Ticker: ADIV Stock Exchange: NYSE Arca.' States 'during the most recent fiscal year of this Fund, when it was operated as a mutual fund' confirming retrospective conversion. Predecessor MF name/ticker not stated in excerpt; asset_class: Asia Pacific equity → equity_intl. Effective date not in excerpt.

Same 497: 'SmartETFs Dividend Builder ETF Ticker: DIVS Stock Exchange: NYSE Arca.' Retrospective ETF prospectus. Predecessor MF name/ticker not in excerpt. asset_class: Dividend Builder without geography → NA.

v._note: Key filing confirming ETF tickers ADIV and DIVS; predecessor MF names/tickers locatable in other excerpts (eee991f24060 etc.).

Gabelli ETFs Trust N-14 filed 2025-12-16: 'The Target Fund, an open-end mutual fund, will be reorganized into the Acquiring Fund, an exchange-traded fund (ETF).' Target Fund name not visible in excerpt (referred to only as 'the Target Fund'). 'shareholders that own the majority...have approved the Reorganization by written consent.' Effective date: '[●], 2026' (placeholder). Acquiring ETF not named in excerpt; no tickers. announce_date = filing date (no board date). confidence L: fund identity not locatable in excerpt.

events._evidence: Global X Funds N-14 filed 2022-12-15: 'each Target Fund (series of Mirae Asset Discovery Funds) will be converted into an ETF through the reorganization of the Target Fund into the corresponding Acquiring Fund (series of Global X Funds).' Target table includes 'Emerging Markets Fund → [Global X Emerging Markets ETF].' Title of Securities registered includes 'Global X Emerging Markets ETF.' Shareholders being asked to vote → board pre-approved. Board date not in excerpt; announce_date = filing date. ETF/MF tickers not in excerpt. asset_class: Emerging Markets → equity_intl.

Same N-14: 'Emerging Markets Great Consumer Fund → [Global X Emerging Markets Great Consumer ETF].' Title of Securities registered includes 'Global X Emerging Markets Great Consumer ETF.' Managed by Mirae Asset USA / Global X affiliate. MF/ETF tickers not in excerpt.

v._note: Two simultaneous Mirae Asset Discovery Fund → Global X ETF conversions. Adviser: Mirae Asset USA / GXMC affiliate relationship.
